prompt: A robot arm reaches for a large glowing red BUY button with a price tag on it. The room is dim with blinking warning lights. No human is present. Unchecked documents pile up on a desk beside the button. A monitor shows a campaign ready to launch. The scene feels tense and unsupervised — this is the nightmare scenario of AI spending money without oversight. Moody lighting with red accents against the dark teal palette. The robot is powerful but unchecked. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: A robot arm reaches for a glowing red BUY button in a dim room with warning lights — no human present, unchecked documents pile up, a campaign ready to launch unsupervised

prompt: A buying robot (sleek, teal-accented) creates a glowing campaign plan document — it's a structured blueprint with budget details and flight dates visible as abstract shapes. The document floats across the scene along a clean pathway to a governance robot sitting behind an official-looking security desk. The governance desk has a shield emblem on the front. The governance robot carefully receives the document and begins examining it with a magnifying glass. Professional, orderly atmosphere — the opposite of the chaos in scene 1. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: A buying robot creates a glowing campaign plan that floats along a clean pathway to a governance robot at a security desk with a shield emblem, who examines it with a magnifying glass

prompt: The governance robot reviews three floating inspection panels arranged side by side. The budget panel shows a bar chart that's nearly at the limit — the bar glows amber as a warning. The brand safety panel has a clean green checkmark with a shield icon. The compliance panel has a green checkmark with a map/flag icon. The governance robot points at the amber budget panel with concern, while the other two panels glow reassuringly green. Clean, clinical lighting — this is a thorough inspection, not a rubber stamp. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: The governance robot reviews three floating inspection panels — budget shows an amber warning bar, brand safety and compliance show green checkmarks

prompt: The governance robot raises an amber flag — it's a physical flag on a pole, glowing amber/yellow. A glowing path leads from the governance desk to a human reviewer: Jordan (Latina woman, mid-30s, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past her shoulders, small silver hoop earrings, wearing a fitted sage-green cardigan over a white collared shirt), sitting at a modern glass desk. She examines the flagged campaign document thoughtfully, one hand on her chin. Between the governance robot and Jordan, the path is clearly structured — this isn't a panic, it's a designed escalation workflow. Calm but serious tone. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: The governance robot raises an amber flag that routes along a glowing path to Jordan, who examines the flagged campaign thoughtfully at her desk

prompt: Jordan (Latina woman, mid-30s, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past her shoulders, small silver hoop earrings, sage-green cardigan over white collared shirt) presses a green approval stamp onto the campaign plan. Attached to the approved plan is a yellow condition tag. The approved plan flows back along a path — through the governance robot who records it in an open ledger book — and continues toward the buying robot waiting in the background. The governance robot adds an entry to its ledger with a pen. Green seal, yellow condition tag, orderly flow. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Jordan stamps the campaign plan with a green approval seal and a yellow condition tag — the plan flows back through the governance robot recording in a ledger

prompt: A cityscape scene with ads running across multiple surfaces: a billboard on a building, a phone screen held by a pedestrian, a TV visible through an apartment window. Above the city, the governance robot watches from a watchtower, scanning the scene with a wide teal beam of light. Metrics and data points stream upward from each ad placement toward the watchtower. The scene feels active and alive — the campaign is running, and governance is watching everything. Evening lighting, the city glows with activity. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: A cityscape with ads on billboards, phones, and TVs — above it all, a governance robot scans from a watchtower with a teal beam, metrics streaming upward from each placement

prompt: A horizontal timeline ribbon stretches across the scene, with glowing nodes at each decision point: a document icon, an amber warning icon, a person icon, a green stamp, a rocket, and a chart. Below the timeline, the governance robot presents an open, detailed log book to three humans standing together (including Jordan — Latina woman, mid-30s, dark wavy hair, silver hoop earrings, sage-green cardigan). The log book shows structured entries. Clean, comprehensive, trustworthy — this is the complete record. Well-lit, professional setting. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: A horizontal timeline with glowing decision nodes — below, the governance robot presents an open audit log to a group including Jordan, showing the complete campaign record
